name: Ship TaLi v2: full report suite (P&L, category, inventory valuation, debt aging) + subscription tiers (Free/Pro/Business), Paystack paywall, rate limiting, and scheduled reports — within PythonAnywhere free-tier limits. — plan
description: Living spec + tracking board for the Ship TaLi v2: full report suite (P&L, category, inventory valuation, debt aging) + subscription tiers (Free/Pro/Business), Paystack paywall, rate limiting, and scheduled reports — within PythonAnywhere free-tier limits. plan. index.html is the multi-tab conceptual walkthrough; board.html is the operational dashboard.

dataSources._comment: Optional external data sources keyed by name. The artifact loads them at runtime via the AppBridge `sources` API. When absent or unreachable (e.g. standalone in a browser), the artifact falls through to the mock-data block declared in `fallback.dataTag`. Example: `"board": { "type": "file", "path": "./data/board.json", "refresh": { "mode": "manual" } }`.
